# Category: container_security

# Start with an official Python runtime as a parent image
FROM python:3-slim  # adjust this based on your use case, e.g., using alpine if you only want the smallest possible container to fit within it (less memory or CPU) for specific versions of python etc...     .   -    ****?|`~ `~~
